name: Pure Biome Lactose-Free Yogurt
description: Pure Biome Lactose Free Yogurt is a delicious and creamy yogurt that is perfect for those who are lactose intolerant. Made with high-quality ingredients, this yogurt is packed with probiotics to support digestive health. It has a smooth texture and a rich flavor that will satisfy your taste buds.

name: Pure Biome Sugar-Free Apple Juice
description: Our Pure Biome Sugar-Free Apple Juice is a refreshing and healthy beverage made from 100% natural apple juice. It is free from added sugars and artificial sweeteners, making it a great choice for those looking to reduce their sugar intake.

name: Pure Biome Probiotic Blend
description: Our Pure Biome Probiotic Blend is a powerful combination of beneficial bacteria that supports digestive health and immune function. Perfect for those looking to improve their gut health and overall well-being.

name: Pure Biome Probiotic Capsules
description: Our Pure Biome Probiotic Capsules are a convenient way to support your digestive health and immune function. Each capsule contains a blend of beneficial bacteria that can help maintain a healthy gut microbiome.
